homepage.heroSubline: Reliable plumbing services for homes and businesses in Arlington and surrounding areas. Get fast, professional service you can depend on.
aboutText: Freds General Plumbing started with a simple goal: to provide honest, reliable plumbing services to our neighbors in Arlington, TX. We've seen it all, from burst pipes during ice storms to clogged drains in older homes, and we're equipped to handle any plumbing challenge.

Our approach is straightforward: diagnose the problem accurately, explain the solution clearly, and execute the repair efficiently. We value integrity and transparency in every job we undertake. No hidden fees, no shortcuts, just quality workmanship.

We're proud to be a part of the Arlington community. We support local schools and charities, and we're committed to providing exceptional service that keeps our city running smoothly. When you choose Freds General Plumbing, you're choosing a neighbor who cares.

valueProps.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
valueProps.description: Plumbing emergencies don't wait, and neither do we. We're available around the clock to handle your urgent plumbing needs.

valueProps.title: Experienced Technicians
valueProps.description: Our team consists of licensed and highly trained plumbers with years of experience in the Dallas-Fort Worth area.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: We provide clear, detailed estimates before we start any work, so you know exactly what to expect.

valueProps.title: Guaranteed Satisfaction
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work. If you're not completely satisfied, we'll make it right.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call Freds General Plumbing now for fast, reliable service in Arlington and beyond.

services.name: Drain Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Stop struggling with slow or clogged drains. We clear them fast!
services.description:
Clogged drains are a common nuisance, especially in older Arlington homes with aging pipes. Hair, grease, food scraps, and mineral buildup can all contribute to blockages. Freds General Plumbing offers comprehensive drain cleaning services to restore proper flow and prevent future problems.

We use a variety of techniques, including drain snaking, hydro jetting, and enzymatic cleaners, to effectively remove obstructions without damaging your pipes. Our experienced technicians will assess the situation, identify the cause of the clog, and recommend the best solution for your specific needs. We handle everything from simple sink clogs to complex sewer line blockages.

Regular drain cleaning can prevent costly repairs down the road and keep your plumbing system running smoothly. Don't wait until a minor clog turns into a major headache. Contact Freds General Plumbing today for fast, reliable drain cleaning services.
process: Step 1: Diagnose the clog with camera inspection.
Step 2: Clear the blockage using snaking or hydro jetting.
Step 3: Inspect the drain to ensure complete removal of debris.
Step 4: Provide recommendations for preventing future clogs.

faq.question: How often should I have my drains cleaned?
faq.answer: We recommend having your drains cleaned at least once a year, or more frequently if you experience recurring clogs.

faq.question: What is hydro jetting?
faq.answer: Hydro jetting uses high-pressure water to blast away stubborn clogs and buildup from the inside of your pipes.

faq.question: Is drain cleaner safe for my pipes?
faq.answer: Chemical drain cleaners can damage your pipes and are often ineffective. We recommend professional drain cleaning services for safe and effective results.

services.name: Water Heater Repair & Installation
services.shortDescription: Get hot water back fast with our expert water heater services.
services.description:
A malfunctioning water heater can disrupt your daily routine, especially during Arlington's occasional cold snaps. Whether you're dealing with a leak, insufficient hot water, or a complete breakdown, Freds General Plumbing is here to help. We offer comprehensive water heater repair and installation services for both traditional tank and tankless systems.

Our experienced technicians are trained to diagnose and repair all types of water heater problems. We use high-quality parts and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs. If your water heater is beyond repair, we can help you choose a new, energy-efficient model that fits your needs and budget.

We understand the importance of having reliable hot water, so we offer prompt and professional service. Don't suffer through cold showers any longer. Contact Freds General Plumbing today for expert water heater repair and installation services.
process: Step 1: Diagnose the water heater problem.
Step 2: Provide a detailed repair or replacement estimate.
Step 3: Perform the repair or install a new water heater.
Step 4: Test the system to ensure proper operation.
benefits: Extended lifespan of your water heater

faq.question: How long does a water heater typically last?
faq.answer: A traditional tank water heater typically lasts 8-12 years, while a tankless water heater can last 20 years or more.

faq.question: What are the benefits of a tankless water heater?
faq.answer: Tankless water heaters provide on-demand hot water, saving energy and space compared to traditional tank models.

faq.question: How do I know if my water heater needs to be replaced?
faq.answer: Signs that your water heater needs to be replaced include leaks, rust, insufficient hot water, and unusual noises.

services.name: Leak Detection
services.shortDescription: Find and fix hidden leaks before they cause major damage.
services.description:
Hidden leaks can cause significant damage to your home, leading to mold growth, structural problems, and high water bills. In Arlington, with its mix of older and newer homes, undetected leaks are a common concern. Freds General Plumbing offers advanced leak detection services to identify and repair hidden leaks before they cause extensive damage.

We use state-of-the-art equipment, including acoustic listening devices and thermal imaging cameras, to pinpoint the source of leaks behind walls, under floors, and in underground pipes. Our experienced technicians are trained to interpret the data and accurately locate even the most elusive leaks.

Once we've identified the leak, we'll provide a detailed repair plan and execute the repairs efficiently and effectively. Don't let a hidden leak drain your wallet and damage your home. Contact Freds General Plumbing today for professional leak detection services.
process: Step 1: Perform a comprehensive inspection of your plumbing system.
Step 2: Utilize advanced leak detection equipment to locate hidden leaks.
Step 3: Provide a detailed report of findings and a repair plan.
Step 4: Execute the repairs with minimal disruption to your property.
benefits: Protection of your home's structural integrity

faq.question: How can I tell if I have a hidden leak?
faq.answer: Signs of a hidden leak include unexplained increases in your water bill, damp spots on walls or floors, and the sound of running water when no fixtures are in use.

faq.question: What types of equipment do you use for leak detection?
faq.answer: We use acoustic listening devices, thermal imaging cameras, and other specialized equipment to locate hidden leaks.

faq.question: How much does leak detection cost?
faq.answer: The cost of leak detection depends on the complexity of the job. We provide upfront estimates before we begin any work.

services.name: Pipe Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Reliable pipe repair and replacement services to protect your home.
services.description:
Damaged or aging pipes can lead to leaks, low water pressure, and even property damage. Freds General Plumbing offers comprehensive pipe repair and replacement services to ensure the integrity of your plumbing system. We understand that Arlington homes, particularly those built in the mid-20th century, often have outdated or corroded piping that requires expert attention.

We handle all types of pipe repairs, from minor leaks to major bursts. Our experienced technicians are skilled in working with various piping materials, including copper, PVC, and PEX. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs.

If your pipes are severely damaged or outdated, we can replace them with new, durable materials. We'll work efficiently to minimize disruption to your home and restore your plumbing system to optimal condition. Don't let damaged pipes compromise your home's safety and value. Contact Freds General Plumbing today for reliable pipe repair and replacement services.
process: Step 1: Assess the condition of your pipes and identify any damage.
Step 2: Provide a detailed repair or replacement estimate.
Step 3: Execute the repairs or replace the damaged pipes.
Step 4: Test the system to ensure proper operation and leak-free connections.
benefits: Increased lifespan of your plumbing system

faq.question: What are the signs of a damaged pipe?
faq.answer: Signs of a damaged pipe include leaks, low water pressure, discolored water, and unusual noises.

faq.question: What types of piping materials do you work with?
faq.answer: We work with copper, PVC, PEX, and other common piping materials.

faq.question: How long does pipe repair or replacement take?
faq.answer: The duration of pipe repair or replacement depends on the extent of the damage and the complexity of the job. We provide upfront estimates with estimated timelines.

services.name: Sewer Line Services
services.shortDescription: Expert sewer line repair, replacement, and cleaning for Arlington homes.
services.description:
Sewer line problems can be messy, disruptive, and even hazardous. Freds General Plumbing offers comprehensive sewer line services to address everything from minor clogs to major breaks. We understand the unique challenges posed by Arlington's soil conditions and aging infrastructure.

We use advanced techniques, such as video camera inspection, to diagnose the problem accurately. We can clear clogs, repair damaged sections of the sewer line, or replace the entire line if necessary. We offer both traditional trenching methods and trenchless techniques to minimize disruption to your property.

Our experienced technicians are equipped to handle any sewer line challenge. We'll work quickly and efficiently to restore your sewer system to optimal condition. Don't let sewer line problems disrupt your life. Contact Freds General Plumbing today for expert sewer line services.
process: Step 1: Perform a video camera inspection to diagnose the sewer line problem.
Step 2: Provide a detailed repair or replacement estimate.
Step 3: Clear clogs, repair damaged sections, or replace the sewer line.
Step 4: Test the system to ensure proper operation and leak-free connections.
benefits: Protection of your property from contamination

faq.question: What are the signs of a sewer line problem?
faq.answer: Signs of a sewer line problem include sewage backups, slow drains, foul odors, and gurgling sounds in your plumbing system.

faq.question: What is video camera inspection?
faq.answer: Video camera inspection allows us to visually inspect the inside of your sewer line to identify the cause of the problem.

faq.question: What is trenchless sewer line repair?
faq.answer: Trenchless sewer line repair involves repairing or replacing the sewer line without digging a large trench, minimizing disruption to your property.

services.name: Fixture Installation
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your home with professional faucet, sink, and toilet installation.
services.description:
Upgrading your fixtures can enhance the look and functionality of your kitchen and bathrooms. Freds General Plumbing offers professional fixture installation services for faucets, sinks, toilets, showers, and more. We understand the importance of proper installation to ensure long-lasting performance and prevent leaks.

Our experienced technicians are skilled in installing all types of fixtures, from basic models to high-end designs. We'll handle everything from removing the old fixture to connecting the new one to the plumbing system. We'll also ensure that the new fixture meets all local codes and regulations.

Whether you're remodeling your entire bathroom or simply replacing a leaky faucet, Freds General Plumbing is here to help. Contact us today for professional fixture installation services.
process: Step 1: Remove the old fixture carefully.
Step 2: Prepare the area for the new fixture.
Step 3: Install the new fixture according to manufacturer's instructions.
Step 4: Test the system to ensure proper operation and leak-free connections.

faq.question: What types of fixtures do you install?
faq.answer: We install faucets, sinks, toilets, showers, bathtubs, and more.

faq.question: Do I need to purchase the new fixture myself?
faq.answer: You can purchase the new fixture yourself, or we can help you choose one from our selection of high-quality products.

faq.question: How long does fixture installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of fixture installation depends on the type of fixture and the complexity of the job. We provide upfront estimates with estimated timelines.

services.name: Gas Line Services
services.shortDescription: Safe and reliable gas line repair, installation, and inspection.
services.description:
Gas line work requires specialized expertise to ensure safety and prevent dangerous leaks. Freds General Plumbing offers comprehensive gas line services, including repair, installation, and inspection. We adhere to the strictest safety standards and regulations to protect your home and family.

Our licensed and experienced technicians are trained to handle all types of gas line work, from repairing minor leaks to installing new gas lines for appliances. We use specialized equipment to detect gas leaks and ensure that all connections are secure.

If you suspect a gas leak, evacuate the premises immediately and call us from a safe location. We'll respond quickly to assess the situation and make the necessary repairs. Contact Freds General Plumbing today for safe and reliable gas line services.
process: Step 1: Detect gas leaks using specialized equipment.
Step 2: Repair or replace damaged gas lines.
Step 3: Install new gas lines for appliances.
Step 4: Inspect gas lines to ensure safety and compliance.
benefits: Safe and reliable gas line services

faq.question: What should I do if I smell gas?
faq.answer: If you smell gas, evacuate the premises immediately and call us from a safe location.

faq.question: Are you licensed to perform gas line work?
faq.answer: Yes, all of our technicians are licensed and experienced in gas line work.

faq.question: What types of gas line services do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer gas line repair, installation, and inspection services.

serviceAreas.content:
Freds General Plumbing is proud to serve the vibrant city of Dallas, Texas. From the historic homes in Oak Cliff to the bustling downtown area, we provide reliable plumbing services to meet the diverse needs of Dallas residents. We understand the unique plumbing challenges presented by the older 1950s ranch-style homes prevalent in many established Dallas neighborhoods, and we're equipped to handle everything from leaky pipes to complete system replacements.

Our team is experienced in dealing with the specific issues that arise in Dallas, such as the impact of the hot, humid summers on plumbing systems. We offer a full range of services, including drain cleaning, water heater repair, and emergency plumbing assistance. Freds General Plumbing is committed to providing Dallas homeowners with quality workmanship and exceptional customer service.
serviceAreas.localContext: Dallas boasts a mix of architectural styles, with many homes in the older neighborhoods dating back to the mid-20th century and earlier. The climate is characterized by hot, humid summers and mild winters.

serviceAreas.content:
Freds General Plumbing is dedicated to providing top-notch plumbing services to the residents of Fort Worth, Texas. We specialize in servicing the charming Craftsman bungalows found near the downtown area, ensuring their plumbing systems are up-to-date and functioning efficiently.

We understand the challenges posed by the hot, humid summers in Fort Worth and offer solutions to protect your plumbing from the elements. Whether you need a simple repair or a complete plumbing overhaul, Freds General Plumbing is here to help. We are committed to providing reliable and affordable plumbing services with a focus on customer satisfaction.

reviews.name: Alice M.
reviews.text: Freds General Plumbing replaced my old water heater quickly and efficiently. The technician was professional and explained everything clearly. I highly recommend them!

reviews.name: Bob K.
reviews.text: I had a stubborn clogged drain that I couldn't clear myself. Freds General Plumbing came out and cleared it in no time. The price was reasonable, and the service was excellent.

reviews.name: Carol S.
reviews.text: I suspected I had a hidden leak, and Freds General Plumbing was able to find it and repair it quickly. They saved me a lot of money and potential damage. Thank you!

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: My sewer line was backed up, and Freds General Plumbing was able to repair it without digging up my entire yard. They were professional, efficient, and reasonably priced. I highly recommend them!

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: Freds General Plumbing installed a new faucet in my bathroom. They were on time, professional, and did a great job. I'm very happy with the results.

reviews.name: Frank T.
reviews.text: I had a gas leak, and Freds General Plumbing responded quickly and repaired it safely. They were professional, knowledgeable, and gave me peace of mind.
